plugins.name: ops
plugins.description: Business operations command center for Claude Code — 25 skills, 13 agents, smart background daemon. Manage communications (WhatsApp/Email/Slack/Telegram), projects, infrastructure (AWS), revenue (Stripe+RevenueCat), e-commerce, marketing, monitoring (Datadog/New Relic/OTEL), and voice. Includes YOLO autonomous mode with 4 C-suite agents.
